label: Maximum Export Row Limit
description: Maximum number of rows returned in CSV/GeoJSON exports. Increase with caution — large exports impact server memory.

label: Export Rate Limit (per hour)
description: Maximum export requests per user per hour to prevent abuse.

label: Default Map Zoom Level
description: Initial zoom level when the map loads (4=country 10=city 14=street).

label: Default Proximity Search Radius (km)
description: Pre-filled radius value in the proximity search panel.

label: Condition Alert Threshold
description: Bridges with conditionRating at or below this value are flagged as alerts on the map.

label: Inspection Staleness Threshold (days)
description: Number of days after which a bridge inspection is considered stale for data quality checks.

label: Quality Score — Red Below (%)
description: Bridges with completeness score below this % are shown in red on the quality dashboard.

label: Quality Score — Amber Below (%)
description: Bridges with completeness score below this % (but above red) are shown in amber.

label: Mass Upload File Size Limit (MB)
description: Maximum file size for XLSX/CSV uploads in megabytes.

label: Mass Upload Batch Size
description: Number of rows processed per database transaction during mass upload.

label: Maintenance Mode
description: When true a maintenance banner is shown to all users. Set to false to dismiss.

label: Maintenance Banner Message
defaultValue: Bridge Management System is currently undergoing maintenance. Some features may be unavailable.
description: Message shown in the maintenance banner when maintenance mode is enabled.

label: Session Timeout (minutes)
description: Idle session timeout in minutes. Changes take effect on next login.

label: Audit Log Retention (days)
description: Number of days to retain change document records. Older records are not automatically purged — this is a reference value for a scheduled job.

label: Demo Mode Active
description: When true the system is running with NSW demo bridge data. Use Demo Mode in BMS Admin to load or clear demo data.

label: SAP EAM Connected
description: When true BMS integrates with SAP S/4HANA EAM for notifications and work orders. When false standalone mode is active.

label: SAP S/4 EAM Base URL
description: Base URL for SAP S/4HANA OData endpoints. Required when eamConnected is true.

label: Gazette Expiry Warning (days)
description: Number of days before gazette expiry to trigger a warning alert.

label: Load Rating Certificate Expiry Warning (days)
description: Number of days before a load rating certificate expires to trigger a warning.

label: PBS Approval Expiry Warning (days)
description: Number of days before a PBS approval expires to trigger a warning.

label: HML Approval Expiry Warning (days)
description: Number of days before an HML approval expires to trigger a warning.

label: NHVR Assessment Expiry Warning (days)
description: Number of days before an NHVR route assessment expires to trigger a warning.

label: Risk Assessment Review Warning (days)
description: Number of days before a risk assessment review is due to trigger a warning.

label: KPI Snapshot Collection Enabled
description: When true the system records daily KPI snapshots for trend analysis.

label: KPI Snapshot Retention (days)
description: Number of days to retain KPI snapshot records (default 3 years).
